programs.title: Murder Below Deck
programs.desc: When Lauren gives up the corporate life and a cheating boyfriend, she joins her best friend working aboard a yacht in the South Pacific. As her first voyage sets sail, she falls for entrepreneur Mark.

programs.title: Girl In The Attic
programs.desc: To honour her mother's memory, Kelsey decides to run a marathon and shares her journey online to raise money. However, her public posts catch the attention of Billy, a seemingly unassuming store worker.

programs.title: Jake Makes It Easy
programs.sub_title: Everything Bagel Galette & Upside Down Banana Bread
programs.desc: Bagels get elevated from a breakfast dish to a perfect anytime meal with this everything bagel galette with heirloom tomatoes. The spin on a favourite is combined with a chocolate-filled banana bread.

programs.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programs.desc: Rachael prepares a beloved family meal of chicken piccata and lemon risotto using locally sourced Italian wine, lemons, and herbs.

programs.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes
programs.desc: Everyone loves lasagna, and Rachael shares her tips for making a delicious, authentic dish made with egg pasta and guanciale, layered with marinara and bechamel sauce.

programs.title: Masterchef Australia
programs.desc: Mikiko Terasaki of Sydney's Omu restaurant shows off her technique in making omurice. Inspired by the visit from viral sensation Mikiko, contestants will have 75 minutes to create a dish featuring eggs.
